title: The Best of Bali Indonesia Experience 2026
details: Highlights: Uluwatu Temple, Mengwi Royal Temple (Taman Ayun), Wanagiri Hidden Hills, Lake Beratan, Ulun Danu Temple, Tanah Lot Temple, Kintamani Volcano View, Tegalalang Rice Terrace, Lempuyang Temple (Gate of Heaven), Tirta Gangga, and Virgin Beach. Enjoy a fully loaded Bali experience with city tours and full-board meals.

itinerary.day_details: Arrival in Bali via MNL–DPS 5J279 (03:45–07:50). Meet and greet, then proceed to Uluwatu Temple and Coffee Factory. Lunch stop before hotel check-in. Dinner at a local restaurant.
Full-day Bedugul tour visiting Mengwi Royal Temple (Taman Ayun), Wanagiri Hidden Hills (Bali Swing & Nest photo stop), Lake Beratan, Ulun Danu Temple, and Tanah Lot Temple.
Visit Tohpati Batik Village, Tirta Empul Spring Temple, Kintamani Volcano View, and Tegalalang Rice Terrace. Jungle Swing is optional.
Full-day Lempuyang tour visiting Lempuyang Temple (Gate of Heaven), Tirta Gangga Water Palace, and Virgin Beach.
Breakfast at hotel. Check out and transfer to airport for return flight DPS–MNL 5J280 (08:35–12:45). Home sweet home!

inclusions: 5 Days / 4 Nights hotel accommodation (4★ or similar)
FULL BOARD MEALS (4 Breakfasts, 4 Lunches, 4 Dinners)
Fully loaded tours and Instagrammable itinerary
extra_details: Full payment 45 days before travel date
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
